description: Safe v1 TikTok Shop Seller API CLI/MCP for auth readiness, token exchange and refresh, read-only shops, orders, products, inventory search, fulfillment packages, and warehouses.

novel_features.name: Official-docs safety context
novel_features.description: Emit machine-readable command, auth, official-doc URL, and mutation-policy context so agents can distinguish confirmed safe v1 capabilities from deferred TikTok Shop surfaces.

novel_features.name: Signed dry-run request inspection
novel_features.description: Build and redact the signed TikTok Shop request shape before any live Open API call, including app key, shop cipher, tokens, and generated sign material.

novel_features.name: Deferred inventory mutation guardrail
novel_features.description: Expose the confirmed inventory update endpoint as an explicit deferred-mutation status instead of executing stock changes before idempotency and retry safety are designed.

catalog_description: Use TikTok Shop Seller API workflows for auth, shops, orders, products, inventory search, fulfillment, warehouses, and safe write preflights.
